alkylation reagent: with 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAM) in the dark at room temperature for 1 h.
alkylation concentration: with 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAM) in the dark at room temperature for 1 h.
cleavage agent: first with Lys-C protease for 4 h and then with trypsin for 16 h
collision energy: Fragmentation was performed with a normalized collision energy of 35%.
fragmentation method: the 15 most intense ions were sequentially isolated for HCD MS/MS fragmentation
instrument: using TMT-labeled LC-MS/MS by LTQ-Orbitrap Elite Mass Spectrometer
ionization type: connected to an Orbitrap Elite hybrid mass spectrometer (Thermo Electron, Bremen, Germany) equipped with a PicoView nanospray interface
reduction reagent: dialyzed against 20 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.4), 100 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl2 and 10 mM β-mercaptoethanol
reduction concentration: dialyzed against 20 mM Tris-HCl (pH 8.4), 100 mM NaCl, 2 mM MgCl2 and 10 mM β-mercaptoethanol
